description: Investigate a single user's complete journey across the application. Enter a user email, ID, or username to see their page views, clicks, API calls, errors, traces, performance metrics, and code-level profiles. Correlates Faro RUM, Loki logs, Tempo traces, Mimir metrics, and Pyroscope profiles.

panels.description: User identity extracted from the first matching log line.
panels.title: User Info

panels.description: Total number of sessions initiated by this user in the selected time range.
panels.title: Total Sessions

panels.description: Total page views recorded by Faro RUM for this user.
panels.title: Total Page Views

panels.description: Total errors this user encountered. Green < 1, yellow < 5, red >= 5.
panels.title: Total Errors Hit

panels.description: Total API requests made by this user in the selected time range.
panels.title: Total API Requests

panels.description: Average response time for this user's requests. Green <= 0.3s, yellow <= 1.0s, red > 1.0s.
panels.title: Avg Response Time

panels.description: Total time this user spent across all sessions.
panels.title: Total Time Spent

panels.description: Full timeline of user activity across all signal types.
panels.title: Activity Timeline

panels.description: User's navigation path in chronological order.
panels.title: Pages Visited (Ordered)

panels.description: Time this user spent on each page.

targets.expr: sum by (page_url) (sum_over_time({job="faro"} | logfmt | user_email=~".*$user_identifier.*" | event_type="page_view" | unwrap duration(time_on_page) [$__range]))

panels.title: Time Spent Per Page

panels.description: Core Web Vitals this specific user experienced. Thresholds follow Google standards.
panels.title: Core Web Vitals

panels.description: All API endpoints this user called with method, path, status code, and count.

targets.expr: topk(20, sum by (method, path, status) (count_over_time({job="$app"} | logfmt | user=~".*$user_identifier.*" [$__range])))

panels.title: API Endpoints Hit

panels.description: Response time percentiles (P50, P95, P99) for this user's requests over time.
panels.title: Response Time Distribution

panels.description: Complete API log stream for this user. Click trace_id to jump to distributed trace.
panels.title: Full Request Log Stream

panels.description: All distributed traces belonging to this user. Click any trace to see the full span waterfall.
panels.title: User's Traces — Search

panels.description: P95 span duration for this service (not user-filtered — shows context).
panels.title: Trace Duration Over Time

panels.description: Traces that resulted in errors for this user. Click trace_id to investigate.
panels.title: Error Traces

panels.description: JavaScript exceptions this user encountered in the browser.
panels.title: Frontend JS Errors (Faro)

panels.description: Server-side errors triggered by this user's requests.
panels.title: Backend Errors

panels.description: Error timeline comparing frontend exceptions and backend errors for this user.
panels.title: Error Timeline — Frontend + Backend

panels.description: Distribution of error types this user encountered.
panels.title: Error Distribution

panels.description: CPU flamegraph filtered to this user's requests. Shows what code paths burned CPU.
panels.title: CPU Profile (Flamegraph)

panels.description: Memory allocation flamegraph for this user's requests.
panels.title: Memory Profile (Flamegraph)

panels.description: What buttons and links this user clicked, in chronological order.
panels.title: Click Events

panels.description: Page-to-page navigation transitions showing the user's journey flow.

targets.expr: sum by (page_from, page_to) (count_over_time({job="faro"} | logfmt | user_email=~".*$user_identifier.*" | event_type="navigation" [$__range]))

panels.title: Navigation Flow

panels.description: Authentication events for this user.
panels.title: Login & Auth Events

panels.description: IP addresses this user connected from. Multiple IPs may indicate VPN or suspicious activity.
panels.title: IP Addresses Used

panels.description: Browsers and devices this user has accessed the application from.
panels.title: User Agents / Devices

list.description: Enter user email, user_id, or username to filter the entire dashboard
list.label: User (email / ID / username)
list.name: user_identifier

title: User Journey & Activity — Full Stack Correlation
